subject_action: Meiling small in frame wiping a clean counter; the half-open door and the steaming bowl on the sill; rain on glass behind
light_intent: fluorescent flat top-light, cold; practical from the cooler
notes: establish geography and the ritual; negative space around her = isolation

subject_action: The paper bowl on the sill, steam thinning
notes: plant the second portion as an object before it matters

subject_action: Kai fills the doorway, doesn't enter, reading the new sign
light_intent: backlit by street; he is a silhouette
sound_cue: rain louder off the open door
notes: low angle gives the absent father weight; backlight keeps him unresolved

subject_action: Meiling rinsing the cloth, not turning
notes: keep her screen-left; hold the 180 line

subject_action: Kai, the question he can barely ask
Her hand and the cloth — the cloth stops
notes: the body answers before the face does

subject_action: Meiling. The name lands. She does not turn. Her thumb stops on the counter edge
notes: THE TURN — the only camera move and the only silence in the scene; the listener carries it

subject_action: Her hand setting the cloth down, careful, like it might break
notes: recognition rendered as an object; next scene bleeds in over the held hand
